name: OnePlus 13
description: OnePlus's flagship for 2025 arrives with a 6.82-inch 2K AMOLED ProXDR display, Snapdragon 8 Elite, and a Hasselblad-tuned triple camera system. 100W SUPERVOOC wired charging and 50W wireless charging fill the 6000 mAh battery at record speeds — perfect for users who refuse to compromise on performance or battery life.

specifications.value: 6.82-inch 2K AMOLED ProXDR, 1–120 Hz LTPO4, 3168 × 1440 px, 4500 nits peak
50 MP main LYT-808 (f/1.6, Hasselblad) + 50 MP periscope telephoto 3× (f/2.6) + 50 MP ultrawide (f/2.0)
6000 mAh, 100W SUPERVOOC wired, 50W AirVOOC wireless, 10W reverse wireless
OxygenOS 15 (Android 15), 4 years OS + 5 years security updates
Ceramic back / vegan leather back (colour dependent), aluminium frame
Midnight Ocean (ceramic), Arctic Dawn, Black Eclipse (vegan leather)

additionalInfo.value: OnePlus 13, 100W SUPERVOOC power adapter, USB-C cable, case, SIM tool

reviews.title: 100W charging is absolutely insane
reviews.reviewText: 0 to 100% in 35 minutes. I cannot overstate how liberating this is — I charge for 15 minutes over breakfast and have a full phone all day. The 6000 mAh battery plus that charging speed is a combination no other flagship matches.

reviews.title: Best display I've seen on a phone
reviews.reviewText: The 2K AMOLED ProXDR is simply stunning. 4500 nits in direct sunlight means it's always readable, and the LTPO4 sipping power at low refresh rates means battery life is exceptional. Hasselblad colours in the camera are rich and true-to-life.

reviews.title: Almost perfect but IP65 is a compromise
reviews.reviewText: In 2026 I expect IP68 from a $900 flagship. That said, everything else about this phone is exceptional. The performance, display, camera, and especially the charging are best in class. OxygenOS 15 is lean and responsive.

reviews.title: The ceramic back feels incredible
reviews.reviewText: The Midnight Ocean ceramic version is my favourite phone design in years. It's cool to the touch, scratch-resistant, and uniquely beautiful. The periscope camera handles portraits at distance brilliantly.

reviews.title: OxygenOS is still the best Android skin
reviews.reviewText: No bloatware, near-stock Android feel with genuinely useful additions. Games load instantly on Snapdragon 8 Elite, the screen is huge and gorgeous, and that 50W wireless charging puts a smile on my face every morning.
